_comment: Project-shared Claude Code settings for the entroly repo. Personal overrides go in .claude/settings.local.json (which is gitignored).

PostToolUse._comment: Feed every tool outcome into the RAVS event log. Powers `entroly ravs report` and the Bayesian routing layer. Quiet + best-effort: a missing entroly binary or a slow capture never blocks Claude Code.

permissions._comment: Pre-approved local commands so contributors don't get nagged for permission on routine entroly dev workflows.
